---
title: "Session 7: ML Foundations (Algorithms)"
subtitle: "Lecture Slides"
section_label: "ML Foundations (Algorithms)"
session: "Session 7"
date: "2026-09-25"
format: revealjs
---

## {data-menu-title="Learning objectives" data-state="hide-menubar"}

<br><br><br><br><br>

::: {.learning-objectives}
- **Explain** A
- **Understand** B
- **Evaluate** C
- **Apply** D
:::


# Business problem: Churn prediction {data-stack-name="Business problem: Churn prediction"}

## Predicting customer churn


## Summary {data-state="hide-menubar"}

- A
- B
- C
- D

# References {data-state="hide-menubar"}
